title: Medica
description: This mod adds medicines to minecraft. You also have new professions for villagers such as pharmacist or dealer.
body:
This mod adds medicines to minecraft. You also have new professions for villagers such as pharmacist or dealer. Medicines for now you can only buy from a pharmacist. And psychoactive or illegal medicines you can buy cheaper from a dealer.
Medicines:
Paracetamol
Ibuprofen
Caffeine
Metamizol
Testosterone
Insulin
Vitamin B
Vitamin C
Vitamin D
Vitamin A
Vitamin K
Diazepam
Amol
Penicillin
Codeine
Adrenalin
Placebo
Nospa
Sertraline
Pantoprazole
Probiotic
Deflegmin
Acetylcysteine
Strepsils
Hydrocortisone
Melatonin
Hitaxa
Aviomarin
LugolsIodine
and much much more
